node.text: The latest SemiAnalysis InferenceX data proves that the best performance drives the lowest inference cost - and that’s NVIDIA GB300 NVL72.

Alpamayo 1 is now Hugging Face’s top-downloaded robotics model with 100K downloads and counting. 🎉 

It helps researchers and autonomous-driving practitioners develop and evaluate vision-language-action models for complex autonomous-driving scenarios, especially rare long-tail events.

🔗 Get started with Alpamayo 1 at the link in our bio.

node.text:
What’s next in robotics starts with physical AI. 🤖 

By combining decades of machine data with AI, simulation, and digital twins, leaders like @agibot_, @frankarobotics, @caterpillarinc, and PlusAI are scaling intelligent machines across industries and redefining what robots can do in the physical world.

Full video in bio. 👆

@Meta is deploying AI at scale through deep codesign across the full NVIDIA platform. This expanded partnership will enable the large-scale deployment of NVIDIA CPUs, millions of NVIDIA Blackwell, Rubin GPUs, and NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet networking to drive peak efficiency for the next frontier of AI.

Visit the link in our bio to learn more.

⚡New data shows NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra delivers up to 50x better performance and 35x lower cost for agentic AI.
Cloud providers are deploying NVIDIA GB300 NVL72 systems at scale for low-latency and long-context use cases including agentic coding and coding assistants.

Click the link in bio to learn how #NVIDIABlackwell platform is maximizing inference performance.

node.text:
Sometimes engineering changes more than technology — it changes lives. 💙

Jensen Huang reflects on meeting his wife in the “EE Fundies” lab at @oregonstate University, where shared problem-solving became the foundation of a lifelong partnership.

Fun fact: they were also part of the OSU IEEE-Eta Kappa Nu Pi Chapter.

#IEEEMedalofHonor #ValentinesDay #Innovation #EngineeringExcellence

💡 Leading inference providers — Baseten, DeepInfra, Fireworks AI, and Together AI — are cutting cost per token by up to 10x across industries with optimized inference stacks powered by the NVIDIA Blackwell platform.

By combining #opensource frontier intelligence with NVIDIA Blackwell’s hardware–software codesign, and their own optimized inference stacks, these providers are delivering dramatic token cost reduction for businesses including Sully.ai, Latitude, Sentient, and Decagon.

Visit the link in bio to learn more.

✨ Thank you to our incredible community of developers and researchers driving AI innovation — one model, one commit, and one breakthrough at a time.

🤗 We’re thrilled to celebrate 50,000+ followers on Hugging Face. 

Keep building with us: https://huggingface.co/nvidia

Did you know there’s an NVIDIA DGX Spark powering AI research at the South Pole? ❄️

At the University of Wisconsin–Madison’s IceCube Neutrino Observatory in Antarctica, researchers are using DGX Spark to run AI models that help study the universe’s most cataclysmic events—through subatomic particles called neutrinos.

The NVIDIA DGX Spark desktop supercomputer brings data‑center‑class AI performance to lab benches, faculty offices, and student systems worldwide, and fuels groundbreaking AI research at universities including ASU, Harvard, ISTA, Mississippi State, NYU, Stanford, and the University of Delaware.

📸 DGX Spark on a ceremonial South Pole marker. Image courtesy of Tim Bendfelt / NSF.

🔗 See our link-in-bio to read more.

node.text:
GTC is your opportunity to build real-world skills with expert-led, hands-on training.

A Training Lab pass gives you access to 65 instructor-led sessions designed to help you:
✔ Build smarter agents
✔ Accelerate robotics learning
✔ Apply proven modeling techniques from Kaggle Grandmasters

⌛ Workshops and training lab passes are nearly sold out. Secure your spot soon. #NVIDIAGTC

Register now, link in bio.

node.text:
Explore the next generation of AI at #NVIDIAGTC, kicking off with the NVIDIA GTC Live pregame, CEO Jensen Huang’s keynote, expert-led sessions, hands-on demos, exclusive networking opportunities, and more. 

It all starts here.

Don't miss the premier AI conference, happening March 16–19 in San Jose.

Visit the link in our bio to learn more.

node.text:
The future of mobility is multimodal.

Hear from leaders from @LucidMotors, @drivenbynuro, @BoschUSA, and PlusAI on how AI, software-first design, and simulation are shaping the next generation of vehicles.

Together, they show how our end-to-end approach is helping move AI-defined vehicles from development to the road.

🎥 Watch the video in our bio.

Grounded in physics. Driven by intelligence. 

Together, @DassaultSystemes and NVIDIA are pioneering a new era of virtual twins that learn, simulate, and evolve. 

Visit the link in our bio to learn more.

node.text:
💡 What do chips and drugs have in common?
Both rely on ultra‑clean environments to prevent contamination and ensure quality.

🧬 Multiply Labs delivers end‑to‑end robotic systems that manufacture gene‑modified cell therapies at scale - boosting precision, reducing contamination, and advancing biomanufacturing through physical AI.

To make this possible, Multiply Labs integrates:
🧠 NVIDIA Omniverse libraries to create digital twins of lab environments
🤖 NVIDIA Isaac Sim to train robots on the specialized skills needed for cell therapy production
🧼 NVIDIA Isaac GR00T, a humanoid foundation robot model, to assist in labs with enhanced hygiene and efficiency

Visit the link in our bio to learn more.
We just announced a major partnership with @NVIDIA. Here is the breakdown of what that entails.

Physical AI is the next frontier of artificial intelligence.

Today, we’re announcing a long-term strategic partnership with @DassaultSystemes to build an industrial AI platform for next-generation virtual twins.

By uniting NVIDIA’s AI and Omniverse platforms with @DassaultSystemes' 3DEXPERIENCE, we are transforming how millions of researchers, designers, and engineers build the world’s largest industries.

Read how global leaders including Bel Group, @LucidMotors, @NIARwsu, and OMRON are already leveraging these technologies.

Click the link in bio to learn more. 
#3DXW26

node.text:
Happy 140th anniversary, @MercedesBenz 🎉

NVIDIA Founder and CEO Jensen Huang congratulates Ola Källenius and the Mercedes-Benz team on the launch of the new S-Class built on NVIDIA DRIVE AV, a major milestone for AI-powered, safety-first autonomy as Mercedes-Benz celebrates more than a century of innovation. 

The new S-Class will enable a premium, chauffeur-style autonomous experience. Mercedes-Benz and NVIDIA will work together with Dara Khosrowshahi and the team at @Uber to make the S-Class available to riders through Uber’s mobility network.

Learn more, link in bio.

user.full_name: Harper Carroll | Artificial Intelligence Expert | Stanford, Meta

node.text:
Traffic, long commutes, and tired drives get easier.

@HarperCarrollAI, @Level1Techs, @KarlConrad, @everydaychrisofficial experienced enhanced level 2 point-to-point driving in the @MercedesBenz CLA on real SF streets. 

Available later this year. 

Link in bio to learn more.

node.text:
🌍 Weather forecasting has always relied on powerful supercomputers running physics-based models. 

We are proud to announce the NVIDIA Earth-2 family of open models — the world’s first fully open, accelerated AI weather stack — saving computational time and costs, and enabling more nations, enterprises, and businesses to run application-specific forecasting systems.

Weather AI is now accessible worldwide at every stage. 

#AMS2026 

Search our website for more.

node.text:
How does RTX neural rendering bring virtual worlds to life?

Watch Bryan Catanzaro, VP of Applied Deep Learning Research, explain how it works and the new levels of realism it brings to graphics and physical AI.

Check the link in our bio to learn about his AMA session at #GDC2026.

NVIDIA is the best place to work in technology and AI, according to Glassdoor. The company also ranks No. 3 on Glassdoor’s list of top employers.

This recognition reflects the impact of NVIDIANs across the company as they do their life’s work. Visit the link in our bio to learn more. #NVIDIAlife

NVIDIA GTC is happening March 16–19, 2026 in San Jose—where attendees can explore what's possible with next-gen AI.

Sessions and experience will cover agentic AI, AI factories, AI for science, CUDA, high-performance inference, open models, physical AI, quantum computing, and more.

Visit the link in our bio to register now to be part of the premier global AI conference.

Plus, save over $300 with #NVIDIAGTC alumni and early-bird discounts, ending February 2.

node.text:
Siemens and NVIDIA are accelerating the next wave of automation with physical AI. 🤝

Watch the full #CES2026 demo to see how Siemens is integrating NVIDIA CUDA-X libraries and Omniverse into its EDA, CAE, and digital twin portfolio, bringing physical AI across the entire industrial lifecycle.

📺 Link in bio.

In conversation with our very own Pascal Daloz and @NVIDIA's Jensen Huang - two visionaries taking the stage at our biggest user event, 3DEXPERIENCE World. 

Join them in Houston on February 3rd as they dive into how AI is reshaping the future of industry.

#3DEXPERIENCE #NVIDIA #3DXW26 #AI

node.text:
Reasoning is the next frontier for autonomous vehicles.

Matt Cragun, Director of Product Management for Autonomous Vehicles and Simulation at NVIDIA, demonstrates how the Alpamayo family of open models, simulation tools, and datasets enables AVs to perceive, reason, and act safely in complex scenarios.

Learn more, link in bio.

node.text:
"We no longer have to train an AI model to know everything on day one."

AI isn’t just predicting the next word anymore. It’s reasoning through problems it’s never seen.💡

Watch the full keynote at the link in our bio.

node.text:
Last week at CES, we shared what’s next across partnerships, innovation, and the future of AI.
If you missed any of it, now’s the perfect time to dive in.

Visit the link in our bio to explore the full recap.

node.text:
What is the next generation of AI? Physical AI. 🦾

AI is no longer just about text generation. It is multimodal and multi-domain, able to see, hear, and reason across language, vision, video, biology, and chemistry, reshaping the world around us.

Watch the full #CES2026 montage to see physical AI in action. Link in bio.

node.text:
At CES, our CEO Jensen Huang unveiled how physical AI is coming to life in factories, robots and the next wave of autonomous vehicles with Rubin, GR00T, Alpamayo and more.

Visit the link in our bio watch the full keynote.

node.text:
"You're always at the frontier on the one hand, you're always customized on the other hand, and it should just run."

At #CES2026, Jensen Huang outlines how AI agents will be built as systems of frontier and open models, with a smart router. 

🔗 Check the link in our bio to watch the full NVIDIA Live replay.

node.text:
Together with NVIDIA, we’re building the Industrial AI Operating System for the real world.

From photorealistic digital twins, like HD Hyundai’s hydrogen-powered ship with 7 million parts, to AI-driven factories, we’re redefining how products are designed, built, and run.

With our industrial AI technology and deep domain know-how and NVIDIA’s accelerated computing and AI expertise, this partnership is unlocking the next era of digitalization.

node.text:
Physical AI took center stage at #CES2026. 🦾

Missed the latest announcements? Catch up on NVIDIA Live with Jensen Huang and explore everything unveiled in physical AI.

▶️Watch the replay at the link in bio.

node.text:
Our vision to build a smarter, more sustainable world demands the most advanced intelligence. That's why we partner with @NVIDIA to infuse AI across our operations. From next-gen machines with AI at the edge to virtualizing our global manufacturing, we're bringing "Grit meets AI" to life. 

Discover how Caterpillar and NVIDIA are building tomorrow's intelligent future! See more at #CatAtCES #CES2026

node.text:
If you’re exploring CES this week, check out NVIDIA Showcase at Fontainebleau and enter our Explore to Win sweepstakes for a chance to win prizes including playing cards and a signed GPU. 🎉 

Click the link in bio to learn more.

A special thanks to @ShinLimMagic for bringing our NVIDIA playing cards to life. ✨

+++ @siemens and @nvidia are building the Industrial AI Operating System.+++

Just the two of us, casually kicking off 2026 together at the world’s most influential tech stage…😉
Incredibly proud to have announced a significant expansion of our strategic partnership with Jensen Huang & @nvidia today at @ces.

Together, we are building the Industrial AI operating system – redefining how the physical world is designed, built, and run - to scale AI and create real-world impact. By combining NVIDIA’s leadership in accelerated computing and AI platforms with Siemens’ leading hardware, software, industrial AI and data, we’re empowering customers to develop products faster with the most comprehensive digital twins, adapt production in real time, and accelerate technologies from chips to AI factories. And we aim to accelerate each others’ operations and portfolio by implementing technologies on our own systems while scaling them across industries.

Thank you, Jensen, for our partnership – and for building the Industrial AI Operating System together with us. 🚀

Yesterday at NVIDIA Live at CES 2026 CEO Jensen Huang shared how AI is transforming every domain and device, redefining the future of computing.

He unveiled the Rubin platform, a new extreme-scale AI supercomputer architecture now in production, alongside major advances in open models and autonomous driving.

🗞️ Click the link in bio to catch up on all the announcements.

node.text:
The next frontier of autonomous driving is unlocked by reasoning models.

NVIDIA Alpamayo brings together open AI models with reasoning capabilities, closed-loop simulation tools, and massive real-world driving datasets.

Alpamayo 1 is a vision–language–action model that explains its own decisions through explicit reasoning traces, enabling trustworthy, humanlike decision-making.

Together with NVIDIA’s Physical AI dataset and AlpaSim simulation, Alpamayo provides the tools and scale required to enable level 4 autonomous vehicles.

▶️ Link in bio.

node.text:
This is NVIDIA DRIVE AV Level 2++ autonomous driving in action on the streets of San Francisco.

Ride along with Sarah Tariq, VP of Autonomous Driving Software at NVIDIA, as the stack navigates real-world urban complexity—from double-parked cars to unprotected left turns.

🎥 Watch the video, link in bio.

This is #NVIDIARubin.

Six new chips designed to deliver one incredible AI supercomputer.

Built with extreme co-design across compute, networking, and software, Rubin sets a new standard for building and deploying the world’s most advanced AI systems at the lowest possible cost. 

Click the link in bio to read more. 

#CES2026

NVIDIA Alpamayo is the first open ecosystem for developing reasoning vision-language-action (VLA) models for autonomous vehicles.

Alpamayo 1, AlpaSim, and Physical AI Open Datasets help AVs perceive, reason, and act with human-like judgment, paving the way for level 4 autonomy.

Read the #CES2026 news at the link in our bio.

node.text:
We're coming to you live from Las Vegas 📽️ with NVIDIA Live: Setting the Stage.

Join us now for an exciting conversation with industry leaders from @Abrigehq, @CodeRabbitAI, Conviction, Evercore, @MercedesBenz, @SkildAI, and @_Snowflake_inc on building the AI-native era.

Our CEO Jensen Huang takes the stage at 1 p.m. PT. Click the link in bio to watch now.

node.text:
Get ready, Las Vegas.

NVIDIA Live with CEO Jensen Huang at @CES is about to set the stage for what’s to come.

Don’t miss your chance to see how the next generation begins—watch it live.

📍 Fontainebleau, 2nd Floor. Doors Open at 11:30 a.m. PT. 
(No CES badge required).
 🎥 Livestream available

RSVP with the link in bio.
#CES2026

node.text:
🎄 Lights are bright, spirits high,
Innovation reaching the sky,
To every gamer, builder, developer too,
Happy holidays from NVIDIA to you! 💚
It’s that time of the year when our wardrobes take a turn for the sweater. Here’s a look at how NVIDIA pets around the world are celebrating the season in our company holiday sweater. #NVIDIAlife

Celebrating a year of incredible breakthroughs and looking ahead to an even brighter future. We wish you a holiday season filled with peace, joy, and meaningful moments.

#HappyHolidays from NVIDIA 💚

We’re excited to join @siemens CEO Roland Busch's keynote at #CES2026. 

Together, Jensen and Roland will discuss the future of industrial AI and how digital twins and accelerated computing are transforming the physical world.

Tuesday, January 6, 2026 | Grab a seat in-person by 8:30 AM or watch the livestream at 9 AM.

Learn more with our link in bio

NVIDIA announces the NVIDIA Nemotron 3 family of open models, data, and libraries, offering a transparent and efficient foundation for building specialized agentic AI across industries.

Nemotron 3 features a hybrid mixture-of-experts (MoE) architecture and new open Nemotron pretraining and post-training datasets, paired with NeMo Gym, an open-source reinforcement learning library that enables scalable, verifiable agent training.

Read more at the link in our bio.

NVIDIA Blackwell NVL72 delivers 1/10th the cost-per-token for MoE models.

By processing ten times as many tokens using the same time and power, the cost-per-token drops dramatically, enabling MoEs to be deployed into everyday products.

This is how frontier intelligence becomes mainstream.

Click the link in bio to read more.

Congratulations to our founder and CEO, Jensen Huang, on being named @financialtimes Person of the Year.

This recognition reflects decades of bold technology bets, a distinctive leadership style, and a culture he has built at NVIDIA that believes in tackling the world’s most complex computing problems.

A year that redefined industries, and accelerated the future of computing. 
 
@TIME sat down with NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang, exploring how NVIDIA’s breakthroughs in AI and accelerated computing are shaping the next industrial revolution. 
 
This incredible progress wouldn’t be possible without our employees and global ecosystem of partners - the innovators, builders, and dreamers harnessing this technology to transform every industry. 
 
Click the link in bio to read more.

node.text:
For the innovator who has everything (except this) . . .

🎁 Compact, capable, and efficient -- NVIDIA DGX Spark is the perfect companion for anyone ready to build, prototype, or refine their AI ideas. 

Give the gift that doesn’t just keep on giving -- it keeps innovating. 

Visit our link in bio to shop & #SparkSomethingBig.
NVIDIA ranked No. 1 on a list of the best-managed companies of 2025 published in The Wall Street Journal. #NVIDIAlife

🎉 We’re excited to partner with Mistral AI on the Mistral 3 family of models, giving researchers and developers access to true frontier-class tech — including 10X better generational performance for Mistral Large 3 mixture-of-experts model.

Huge congrats to the Mistral AI team — thrilled to push open-source innovation forward together. 

Visit the link in our bio to learn more.

We’re honored to rank No. 1 on @newsweek’s list of America’s Most Responsible Companies.

Visit the link in our bio to see the full ranking. #NVIDIAlife

NVIDIA and Synopsys announce a strategic partnership to revolutionize engineering and design.

“Our partnership with Synopsys harnesses the power of NVIDIA accelerated computing and AI to reimagine engineering and design — empowering engineers to invent the extraordinary products that will shape our future.” - Jensen Huang

Visit our link in bio to learn more.

node.text:
Holiday gifting at Jensen’s house hits different. ✨🐶

With 50% off Jetson AGX Orin, 20% off Jetson Thor, and a festive price on Jetson Orin Nano Super, there’s a powerful NVIDIA Jetson AI robotics computer ready to be unwrapped. 

Make your robot’s holiday wish come true - seasonal deals are live now. 

🛒 Link in bio.

node.text:
These three want some presents. Do you? 🐶

Stay tuned for the 🎁 reveal of the season on Friday, Nov 28.

node.text:
Behind every magical moment is incredible technology. ✨

From BDX Droids to Olaf, see how characters come to life in collaboration with NVIDIA robotics technologies. The Disney Research team makes it possible using open-source Newton and NVIDIA Isaac Sim for training, powered by NVIDIA Jetson.

🎥 Watch the latest “We Call It Imagineering” episode featuring CEO @NVIDIA Jensen Huang and @WaltDisneyImagineering’s President and Chief Creative Officer Bruce Vaughn.

Link in bio.

node.text:
A huge thank-you to everyone who joined us at #SC25!

The conversations, collaborations, and shared passion for high-performance computing made this year’s event exceptional.

Don’t miss our top updates with our link in bio.

@forbes named NVIDIA No. 1 on its America’s Dream Employers list, and No. 1 on its inaugural ranking of America’s Best-in-State Companies - California. 

Find out more about both lists at the links in our bio. #NVIDIAlife

node.text:
Our Founder and CEO Jensen Huang made a surprise stop at our #SC25 opening gala!

After sharing his vision for the future of accelerated computing, he handed out NVIDIA DGX Sparks to a few lucky winners and even signed our signature cocktail glasses.

What a way to kick off #SC25! 🎉 

We are leading with innovation across the stack. Visit the link in our bio to dive into the rolling blog for all the breakthroughs.

node.text:
NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang outlines the next phase of accelerated computing and AI — from national AI infrastructure and quantum computing to robotics and reindustrialization.

Broadcast from the nation’s capital, #NVIDIAGTC Washington, D.C. highlights how NVIDIA and its partners are advancing America’s AI leadership.

Visit the link in our bio to watch the full keynote.

We’re proud to be named No. 1 on @forbes’ list of Most Trusted Companies in America. 

Click the link in our bio to see the full ranking. #NVIDIAlife

In the latest #MLPerf Training v5.1 round, NVIDIA swept all seven benchmarks.

The NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra GPU made its MLPerf Training debut, delivering large leaps for LLM pretraining and LLM fine-tuning performance, supercharged by the world’s first FP4 training submissions with NVFP4. 

Visit the link in our bio to learn more.

node.text: The future of workforce starts now! At a GTC DC watch party hosted by @howard1867 , DC high school students kicked off their NVIDIA Training with StudyFetch - building the AI skills that will power tomorrow’s careers. This is the White House Pledge to America’s Youth in action. Next up - every high school in the country! #NVIDIAGTC

node.text:
Catch moments from #NVIDIAGTC at our nation's capital, where developers and technology leaders came together to build on US leadership in AI innovation, and lay a foundation for what's to come next. 

Visit the link in our bio to watch sessions now on demand.

NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang and Chief Scientist Bill Dally have been awarded the 2025 Queen Elizabeth Prize for Engineering.

Presented by King Charles III, the award acknowledges their contributions to the GPU architectures that power today’s AI technologies.

NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang has been awarded the Professor Stephen Hawking Fellowship by the Cambridge Union Society and the Hawking family. 

This award recognizes his work in advancing science and inspiring the next generation of technologists and researchers.

Read more about The Hawking Fellowship at the link in our bio.

Hundreds of creators at #AdobeMAX. One RTX-powered masterpiece.

Watch the #MadeWithRTX community-edited music video. 📺

Huge thanks to everyone who helped bring it to life. 💚

Today in Berlin, @deutschetelekom and @nvidia unveiled the world’s first Industrial AI Cloud, a sovereign, enterprise-grade platform set to go live in early 2026.

The partnership brings together Deutsche Telekom’s trusted infrastructure and operations and NVIDIA AI and Omniverse digital twin platforms to power the AI era of Germany’s industrial transformation.

“We have to build a stack here in Germany which is enabling our industry to participate in this next-generation evolution of industrialization,” Deutsche Telekom CEO Tim Höttges said.

With this launch, Europe gains a new engine for industrial innovation — based in Germany — to accelerate sovereign AI development and deployment for enterprises and industries.

“These computers, are the modern versions of factories,” Huang said. “These are factories, just like factories of cars and all the industrial factories of Germany, these are factories of intelligence.”

It’s AI made for Europe — secure, compliant and ready to accelerate everything from digital twins to predictive maintenance.

Read more: https://nvda.ws/4ohIoyB

node.text:
Relive the excitement from the GeForce Gamer Festival Seoul 🇰🇷 

Last week, we celebrated 25 years of GeForce in Korea with new RTX announcements from NCSOFT and KRAFTON, epic StarCraft battles, giveaways, live performances, and a special appearance from Jensen Huang.

Big moments for NVIDIA at #APEC2025!

Jensen Huang shared an exciting vision for accelerating the AI industrial revolution — powering the next wave of robotics and digital transformation. 🤖 🌏 

And @nvidiageforce turned 25 in Korea with RTX tech showcases, unreleased games, esports battles, and epic performances. 🎮 

Visit the link in bio to learn more.
Happy Halloween from mini Jensens, Grace Hopper, and the first computer “bug!” #NVIDIAlife

node.text:
One last surprise for our #NVIDIAGTC golden ticket winners 👀 🎁

Yesterday, we took the winners to see our brand new NVIDIA DGX Spark on the show floor... and then gave them each one.

We can't wait to see what they create. #SparkSomethingBig ✨

node.text:
What an incredible afternoon at @howard1867 with the NVIDIA Gear Store Truck! 💚

Thank you to everyone who stopped by at the Armour J. Blackburn Center. We appreciated the warm welcome, great conversations, and the chance to share our latest gear with Bison Nation.

#NVIDIAGTC

node.text:
New fit just dropped 👀

Thank you, Mariya Shah (@mariyasha888), for showcasing our latest NVIDIA Gear at #NVIDIAGTC 💚 Great to have you here!

In his keynote address in Washington D.C., NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang laid out the blueprint for America’s AI century. From massive GPU deployments and quantum breakthroughs to secure government AI factories, robotics and autonomous mobility, each announcement builds America’s AI backbone:

• Reindustrializing America with physical AI and digital twins
• Setting global standards with AI‑native 6G
• Anchoring quantum leadership with NVIDIA NVQLink
• Modernizing government with secure, deployment‑ready AI infrastructure designs
• Forming America’s open‑model backbone with daily contributions
• Accelerating autonomy with a unified DRIVE Hyperion ecosystem

Read more at NVIDIA.com.

node.text:
There’s still time to catch the excitement ✨ 

Don’t miss these iconic interviews happening now at #NVIDIAGTC Live in Washington D.C.!

Click the link in bio to tune in now.

#NVIDIAGTC is off to an incredible start! 

There's still time to join us with an Exhibits Only pass for $80 (by saving with code GTCDC20). Visit the link in our bio to get yours. 

🎟️ Badge pickup opens tomorrow at the Walter E. Washington Convention Center, 8:00 a.m. – 6:00 p.m. ET.

The Gear Store Truck tour is officially underway! 🚚

Starting with @georgemasonu the #NVIDIAGTC energy is spreading across campuses. Follow along as we roll to the next stop 💚

📍 @americanuniversity: Anderson Hall, 10/27 9:30am-11:30am
📍 @howard1867: The Armour J. Blackburn Center, 10/27 12:30pm-2:30pm
📍 @univofmaryland: Brendan Iribe Center, 10/27 3pm-5pm

3 days until #NVIDIAGTC takes over Washington, D.C. ⚡

Get ready for powerful insights, hands-on demos, and the innovations transforming every industry starting on Monday — all leading up to NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang’s keynote on Tuesday, October 28. ➡️ nvidia.com/gtc/dc

We’re honored to be named No. 1 on @time’s inaugural America’s Growth Leaders list.

This recognition reflects the impact of every NVIDIAN, researcher, and partner fueling our mission to redefine what’s possible in computing. 

Click the link in our bio to see Time and Statista’s full list. #NVIDIAlife

node.text:
Get ready for an unforgettable keynote from NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang, where he’ll unveil what’s next in agentic AI, robotics, and accelerated computing.

📍 October 28 at 12PM ET / 9AM PT, streaming live from Washington, D.C. 
🎬☕+ kick-start keynote day with the #NVIDIAGTC Live pregame show starting at 8:30AM ET.

Visit the link in our bio to learn more.

✨ Last week, Jensen made a special trip to @OpenAI, to personally deliver NVIDIA DGX Sparks to Sam Altman, and team. We are honored to share this milestone in AI -- bringing AI supercomputing to the desktop with OpenAI. 

“DGX-1 launched the era of AI supercomputers and unlocked the scaling laws that drive modern AI. With DGX Spark, we return to that mission — placing an AI computer in the hands of every developer to ignite the next wave of breakthroughs.” - Jensen Huang

Today’s the day to #SparkSomethingBig as devices are now shipping. 

Visit the link in our bio to learn more.

node.text:
That’s a wrap on @Oracle #AIWorld 🎉 

NVIDIA showed up in a big way — from the keynote stage with Ian Buck, VP of Hyperscale and HPC, and Mahesh Thiagarajan, EVP of @Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, to deep tech conversations with Dave Salvator, Director of Accelerated Computing Products — showcasing how we’re powering the future of enterprise AI.

Visit the link in our bio to learn more.

Today is the day. NVIDIA DGX Sparks are now shipping from us and from our partners. 

We enjoyed delivering some of our first desktop AI supercomputers to researchers, developers, universities, creators, to launch the next chapter in AI:

@RefikAnadol -- Refik Anadol Studio 
Yagil Burowski — LM Studio 
Soumith Chintala — PyTorch @Meta, and @NYUniversity
ComfyAnonymous — Creator of ComfyUI 
Lev Gonick — @ArizonaStateUniversity Enterprise Tech
Yann LeCun — FAIR (@Meta), @NYUniversity
Joseph Mardall — @Zipline
Jeffrey Morgan — Ollama
Joseph Nelson — Roboflow
@iamwill — @FYI.AI

And special thanks to 🙌 Serve Robotics.

Visit the link in our bio to watch the full video. 

#SparkSomethingBig ✨

✨ We were honored to deliver some of the very first NVIDIA DGX Sparks to AI Pioneer Yann LeCun, and AI Researcher, Soumith Chintala, from @Meta and @nyuniversity in NYC.

“Every PhD student in AI should have one of these,” said Yann. 

We couldn’t agree more.

We are anticipating great things from their visionary AI research. 

Visit the link in our bio to learn more. 

#SparkSomethingBig 💫

Cameo moment from our DGX Spark launch. 

✨ "From a single spark, a world of intelligence!" signed by Jensen on one of the first devices. 

Are you ready to #SparkSomethingBig?

node.text:
📣 The storage system has been reinvented for the age of AI reasoning.

Our CEO Jensen Huang sat down with NetApp CEO George Kurian to discuss how they’re bringing accelerated computing, NVIDIA AI software, and data platforms together to solve the unstructured data challenge. 

NetApp AFX and the NetApp AI Data Engine enable enterprises to index, manage, and process massive volumes of data semantically across their entire infrastructure, allowing businesses to accelerate and scale their enterprise AI workloads. #NetAppINSIGHT

Visit the link in bio to watch the full conversation.

🎉 To celebrate DGX Spark shipping worldwide starting Wednesday, our CEO Jensen Huang just hand-delivered some of the first units to Elon Musk, chief engineer at @SpaceX 🚀, today in Starbase, Texas. 

The exchange was a connection to the new desktop AI supercomputer’s origins -- the NVIDIA DGX-1 supercomputer -- as Musk was among the team that received the first DGX-1 from Huang in 2016.

Visit the link in our bio for details, and on more early deliveries to developers, creators, researchers, universities, and more.

#SparkSomethingBig ✨

🚨NVIDIA and its partners will start shipping DGX Spark — the world’s smallest AI supercomputer.

Early recipients of DGX Spark, are testing, validating and optimizing their tools, software and models for DGX Spark.

Built on the NVIDIA Grace Blackwell architecture, DGX Spark integrates NVIDIA GPUs, CPUs, networking, CUDA libraries and NVIDIA AI software, accelerating agentic and physical AI development. 

Visit the link in bio to learn more.

#SparkSomethingBig ✨

We’re honored to share that the NVIDIA DGX Spark was named one of @TIME’s Best Inventions of 2025 🏆 

Our new desktop AI supercomputer will deliver an unprecedented 1 petaflop of AI compute, right to your workspace, making state-of-the-art AI more accessible than ever.

🙌 We can’t wait to see what innovators build next.

#SparkSomethingBig ✨
